title: Disable the option to let viewers ask to be members
excerpt: We have to provision our member access via a request through another software, i.e. Marc.  However, we have viewers using the option in the tool to ask to be granted members.  This causes confusion and additional emails …

posts.author: ElaineEd (Elaine Edwards)
posts.cookedHtml: We have to provision our member access via a request through another software, i.e. Marc. However, we have viewers using the option in the tool to ask to be granted members. This causes confusion and additional emails that the admins have to respond to and direct them to the correct process to request member access. Can this option be disabled in the tool?
